meta.title: Google VEO 3 Just Got INSANE - Image to Video with YOUR Voice
meta.description:
You can now add sound to Google VEO 3 Image to Video AI generator
Access Google VEO3 & Flux here 👉 http://openart.ai/home/?ref=veo3

Google Veo3 launched image to videos with audio. Now the question remains: How to add your own voice in google veo3. In this video I show you a new method of how to use elevenlabs together with VEO 3 to have complete control over how the AI voice sounds. My main complain was that VEO 3 doesn't sound like me, in this tutorial I teach you how to fix that.

Tools I used
OpenArt for images & VEO 3 fast - http://openart.ai/home/?ref=veo3
Elevenlabs for speech to speech -https://try.elevenlabs.io/veo3


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
